query:
SELECT p.product_name, p.sheet_name, p.partner_buy_price, COUNT(*) as service_count
FROM services s
JOIN sasboss_pricebook_items p
  ON p.version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1)
  AND LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE
  s.status != 'terminated'
  AND LOWER(IFNULL(s.billingPlatform,'')) LIKE '%sasboss%'
GROUP BY p.product_name, p.sheet_name, p.partner_buy_price
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY p.product_name, p.sheet_name;

SELECT p.product_name, p.sheet_name, p.partner_buy_price, COUNT(*) as service_count
FROM services s
JOIN sasboss_pricebook_items p
  ON p.version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1)
  AND LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE
  s.status != 'terminated'
  AND LOWER(IFNULL(s.billingPlatform,'')) LIKE '%sasboss%'
GROUP BY p.product_name, p.sheet_name, p.partner_buy_price
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY p.product_name, p.sheet_name;
